nodes.name: Count Total Leads
nodes.notes: count=exact + limit=0 returns count in content-range header without fetching rows

nodes.name: Fetch Leads 7-Day
nodes.notes: Fetch leads from last 7 days with status for conversion rate calculation

nodes.name: Fetch Revenue 30-Day
nodes.notes: Fetch 30-day revenue for avg_job_value and revenue_total calculations

nodes.name: Fetch SMS Yesterday
nodes.notes: Fetch yesterday's SMS sends for response rate calculation

nodes.name: Fetch Email Yesterday
nodes.notes: Fetch yesterday's email sends for open rate calculation

nodes.name: Upsert KPI Metrics
nodes.notes: Upsert all KPI metrics. UNIQUE index on (metric_date, metric_name) enables merge-duplicates.
